nasb.text: Therefore many other signs Jesus also performed in the presence of the disciples, which are not written in this book;

esv.text: Now Jesus did many other signs in the presence of the disciples, which are not written in this book;

cnv.text: 耶穌在門徒面前還行了許多別的神蹟，沒有記在這書上。

ccb.text: 耶稣在门徒面前还行了许多神迹，只是没有记在这本书里。

csbs.text: 事实上，耶稣在他的门徒们面前还行了很多别的神迹，没有记在这部书里。
